description: Multi-enrollment SMTP-to-Email bridge. Each enrollment receives email through the UnitySVC SMTP gateway and forwards the faithful, lossless email envelope (`from`, `to`, `subject`, `text_body`, `html_body`, headers, attachments, spf/dkim) to a per-enrollment HTTP endpoint. Customers supply the destination URL as an enrollment parameter (`base_url`) and an optional customer-secret name for auth (`api_key_secret`). Use this when you need multiple email-to-webhook routes (e.g. inbound mail for sales, support, and ops each landing in a different receiver) under a single account.
name: smtp-to-email-plus

payout_price.description: No platform commission — customer uses own HTTP receiver
